sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: UNICEF Venture Fund Climate Ventures

eligibility.summary: Early-stage for-profit technology startups registered in UNICEF programme countries with working open-source prototypes. Women-led and young founders encouraged.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: UNICEF Grant for Child-sensitive Advocacy on Heatwaves and Air Pollution

eligibility.summary: Civil society organizations, NGOs, academic and research institutions working in child health, climate change, disaster risk reduction, or policy advocacy. Must have operational capacity in Uttar Pradesh.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: UNESCO TWAS-CSIR Postgraduate Fellowship 2026

eligibility.summary: Nationals of developing countries (excluding India) that are TWAS member states. Must hold a Master's degree, be under 35, not already residing in India.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: UNESCO MAB Young Scientists Awards 2026
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: Man and the Biosphere Young Scientists Awards
sdg_research_opportunities.organization: UNESCO Man and the Biosphere Programme

eligibility.summary: Young researchers aged 35 or under. Must obtain endorsement from National MAB Committee or National Commission for UNESCO. Research must align with MAB Programme objectives.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: UNDP RFP for Gender-Responsive SDG Framework Development

eligibility.summary: Registered agencies/service providers with capacity to develop gender-responsive SDG frameworks. Must register on UNDP Quantum supplier portal.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: UNDP RFP for SWM Capacity-Building Frameworks

eligibility.summary: Service providers registered on UNDP Quantum supplier portal. Must have expertise in solid waste management and capacity-building frameworks for urban local bodies.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: Gates Foundation Addressing Physiological Barriers to Micronutrient Absorption

eligibility.summary: Research organizations and institutions working on nutrition and health. Part of Grand Challenges family.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: Evidence for AI in Health (EVAH) Initiative
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: EVAH AI in Primary Health Care
sdg_research_opportunities.organization: Gates Foundation, Novo Nordisk Foundation, Wellcome

eligibility.summary: Research teams in LMICs including India conducting evaluations of AI-enabled decision support tools in primary and community health care settings.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: DBT/Wellcome Trust India Alliance Biomedical Research Fellowships
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: Biomedical Research Career Programme Phase III

eligibility.summary: Indian researchers and non-Indians willing to work in India. Four tracks: Early Career, Intermediate, Senior, and Margdarshi Fellowships. Phase III approved with INR 1500 Crore funding.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: NABARD National Climate Stack Innovation Challenge

eligibility.summary: Research institutions, universities, startups, and private-sector innovators. Challenge structured in multi-stage process from March to June 2026.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: Reliance Foundation and Gates Foundation ShikshaNext Initiative

eligibility.summary: EdTech and AI solution providers targeting underserved communities in India. Multi-donor initiative with EdTech ScaleX, EdTech Accelerator, and Innovation Hub components.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: Reliance Foundation and Gates Foundation SheConnects Digital Accelerator

eligibility.summary: Organizations with evidence-backed solutions for women's digital inclusion in India. Three-year initiative with grants to scale high-impact solutions.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: Social Alpha Techtonic Innovations for Sustainability

eligibility.summary: Startups working in energy transition, new materials, and natural resources across three tracks: R&D (up to INR 30L), Pilot (up to INR 40L), and Scale-up (up to INR 60L). Non-dilutive grant support.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: Social Alpha Techtonic Innovations for Agriculture and Rural Livelihoods
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: Techtonic: Innovations for Agriculture and Rural Livelihoods

eligibility.summary: Innovators and startups with technology-based solutions for small and marginal farmers. Pilot deployment funding up to INR 50L, deployment funding up to INR 2 Cr.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: Villgro MAP-Health Accelerator

eligibility.summary: Social enterprises with market-ready healthcare innovations. Solutions must target NCDs, women's health, or climate-sensitive diseases. Go-to-market strategy support and pilot implementation.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: Villgro The Water Lab
sdg_research_opportunities.organization: Villgro in partnership with Accenture in India

eligibility.summary: Innovative startups with water solutions. Funding of INR 25 lakhs for pilot deployments with urban local bodies.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: Climate-KIC ClimateLaunchpad 2026

eligibility.summary: Sustainability ventures under 2 years old, raised less than €200,000, and not yet sold products commercially. Free to join. Global Grand Final in Singapore.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: Climate-KIC Circular Economy Innovation Clusters India
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: CEIC Circular Economy & Social Impact Programme

eligibility.summary: Entrepreneurship Support Organisations (ESOs) in Bengaluru, India. Must have active track record of entrepreneurship programmes. Grants of up to 50,000 EUR to design circular economy programmes.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: Nasscom Foundation Climate Tech Challenge

eligibility.summary: DPIIT-recognized startups with innovative climate tech solutions. Two finalists receive INR 10 lakhs each CSR grant plus mentoring support.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: Nasscom Foundation and Ciena TechForChange

eligibility.summary: Student innovators from leading Indian institutions. Program bridges campus creativity with real-world application. Has engaged 360+ ideas, 200+ teams, 40+ prototypes.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: Acumen India Fellowship 2026

eligibility.summary: Social entrepreneurs and senior decision-makers with 5+ years experience solving problems of poverty. Applications open annually (Sep-Oct). 6-month hybrid program.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: Azim Premji Foundation Grants for NGOs

eligibility.summary: Not-for-profit organizations working with vulnerable communities in India. Multi-year grants from a few lakhs to tens of crores. Tenure 1-10 years, most 3-4 years.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: GIZ Technical Assistance for Waste Management and Green Public Spaces India
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: Technical Assistance for Gender-Responsive SWM/Circular Economy and Green Public Spaces India

eligibility.summary: Service providers registered on GIZ procurement platform. Technical assistance for implementing gender-responsive solid waste management and green public spaces in India.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: Green Climate Fund BEACON INDIA Climate Innovation Incubation
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: BEACON INDIA - Building Eco-system for Accelerating Contribution to NDC through Climate Innovation Incubation

eligibility.summary: Climate technology ventures in India. Programme approved Oct 2025. Will incubate 100 early-stage climate ventures, prepare 50 for scale-up, provide step-up financing to 30 ventures.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: Wipro Sustainability Educators Program

eligibility.summary: Partner organizations and individuals interested in sustainability education in schools. Grant up to INR 3 lakh per annum for up to 3 years. Multiple cohorts across India.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: Social Alpha Techtonic Innovations in Sustainable Urban Transition
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: Techtonic: Innovations in Sustainable Urban Transition
sdg_research_opportunities.organization: Social Alpha and U of T India Foundation

eligibility.summary: Startups developing technology-led solutions for urban climate resilience. Pilot grants up to INR 35 lakhs, potential seed capital up to INR 1 Cr. Pilots with urban local bodies.
